rationale: Decomposition + impacted-domains parity both hold. Parity: every MODIFIED surface maps to its declared owner (approve/complete/lifecycle/panel/setup/.claude+.agents/skills -> workflow; executor -> execution). The round-7 worktree-enum leg consumes internal/bead's existing WorktreeList (bdcli.go:202) read-only; internal/bead is execution-owned (execution/OWNERSHIP.yaml:3), internal/approve already imports it (impl.go:13, verified), and empty diff vs origin/main confirms no bead change lands. Correctly treated as NOT a touched surface -- declaring it under execution would be a false declared-but-untouched claim; the spec's non-declaration is right parity discipline (unlike internal/panel, which is genuinely workflow-owned and so listed). No path touched-but-undeclared; internal/gitutil correctly DROPPED (no change, round-6 C+B). internal/lifecycle NEW workflow claim = exactly-one claimant verified, pinned by AC10. Decomposition: the leg folds into the gate bead (same package/domain, beside probe/R1 legs); AC13->approve, AC10->lifecycle both already-touched packages; no new bead, domain, package, or import edge. No over/under-scope: read-only consume, shared predicate byte-unchanged, executor loop behaviorally untouched (OQ4 no-seam). WorktreeListEntry.Branch supplies the bead/ filter with no bead edit.

findings.note: Round-7 leg lives in internal/approve (workflow, already touched), consuming internal/bead.WorktreeList read-only. internal/bead is execution-owned but unmodified (empty diff vs main); approve already imports bead (impl.go:13). No new import edge, no bead change. Read-only foreign-domain consume correctly exempt from Impacted Domains -- not touched-but-undeclared.

Spec's Impacted Domains explicitly reasons internal/bead read-only consume is 'not a touched surface'. Asymmetry vs internal/panel (declared in workflow bullet) is CORRECT: panel is workflow-owned (the touched domain); bead is execution-owned and a read-only call does not make execution touched beyond its executor declaration. No declared-but-untouched domain introduced.
AC13 TestApproveImpl_WorktreeEnumRefusesDespiteProbeMiss targets internal/approve (0 hits at 50165d81, verified). Folds into the gate bead alongside AC1-7/AC11. No new pannellable unit needed.

AC10 TestLifecycleOwnershipExactlyOneWorkflowClaimant targets internal/lifecycle (0 hits at 50165d81, verified). Maps to the already-touched lifecycle/ownership surface; exactly-one-workflow-claimant confirmed across all domain OWNERSHIP.yaml at review SHA.

Leg adds no new package modification: WorktreeListEntry.Branch already supplies the bead/ filter; shared FindOrphanedClosedBeads byte-unchanged for complete/next/doctor; executor merge loop behaviorally untouched (OQ4 no-seam); internal/gitutil stays dropped. Blast radius contained; spec still cleaves into ~2-3 beads (gate / executor-no-regression / docs).
